Description: Nematodirus battus genome assembly, chromosome: X
Taxonomy_y: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Ecdysozoa; Nematoda; Chromadorea; Rhabditida; Rhabditina; Rhabditomorpha; Strongyloidea; Molineidae; Nematodirus
Assembly: The assembly nxNemBatt8.hap1.1 is based on 71x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Wellcome Sanger Institute Tree of Life Programme (https://www.sanger.ac.uk/programme/tree-of-life/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds are named by synteny based on Caenorhabditis elegans (nematodes) GCA_028201515. The chromosomes were named based on BUSCO painting to C. elegans N2.
